profile..validate: newData.hasChildren(['createdAt']) && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber() && newData.child('createdAt').val() <= now && newData.child('createdAt').val() >= 1577836800000 && (!data.exists() || newData.child('createdAt').val() === data.child('createdAt').val())

activity..validate: newData.hasChildren(['lastSeenAt']) && newData.child('lastSeenAt').isNumber() && newData.child('lastSeenAt').val() <= now && newData.child('lastSeenAt').val() >= now - 10000

visits..validate: newData.hasChildren(['count', 'lastAt']) && newData.child('count').isNumber() && newData.child('count').val() > 0 && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('count').val() === 1) || (data.child('count').isNumber() && newData.child('count').val() === data.child('count').val() + 1)) && newData.child('lastAt').isNumber() && newData.child('lastAt').val() <= now && newData.child('lastAt').val() >= now - 10000

$link..validate: newData.hasChildren(['count', 'lastAt']) && newData.child('count').isNumber() && newData.child('count').val() > 0 && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('count').val() === 1) || (data.child('count').isNumber() && newData.child('count').val() === data.child('count').val() + 1)) && newData.child('lastAt').isNumber() && newData.child('lastAt').val() <= now && newData.child('lastAt').val() >= now - 10000

$sessionId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['startedAt']) && newData.child('startedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('startedAt').val() <= now && newData.child('startedAt').val() >= now - 10000

$eventId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['type', 'at']) && newData.child('type').isString() && (newData.child('type').val() === 'email' || newData.child('type').val() === 'whatsapp' || newData.child('type').val() === 'phone') && newData.child('at').isNumber() && newData.child('at').val() <= now && newData.child('at').val() >= now - 10000
